message:
fix(wire): validate PaneDelta content_len matches actual content length

Add content_len vs content.len() check in WireEnvelope::decode_and_validate
for PaneDelta payloads. Mismatched lengths (from bugs or malicious input)
could mislead downstream buffer allocation. Returns InvalidJson error
with descriptive message when non-empty content has wrong content_len.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
